_note: This report OVERWRITES the prior false-positive QA report. All verification evidence was collected by running grep/read/git commands directly against the actual file agents/changelog-analyst.md.

qa.user_verbatim_complaint: Fix: Push-gate token `session_id` mismatch. The `changelog-analyst` subagent writes the push-gate token at `/tmp/agentic-commit/push/<repo-hash>/<branch>.json`. The token includes a `session_id` field. Currently this field is set to the changelog-analyst's own internal `CLAUDE_SESSION_ID` (the subagent's session), NOT the orchestrator's `CLAUDE_CODE_SESSION_ID`. Fix scope: In `agents/changelog-analyst.md`: when building the Python script that writes the push-gate token, use `os.environ.get("CLAUDE_CODE_SESSION_ID") or os.environ.get("CLAUDE_SESSION_ID", "unknown")` as the `session_id` value.

out_of_scope_observations.observation: Line 75 manifest SID still uses CLAUDE_SESSION_ID only (Set SID="${CLAUDE_SESSION_ID:-unknown}"). Separate concern from push-gate token — out of T1 scope per BA spec Won't Have.

Working tree shows scripts/execute-push.py modified vs baseline SHA 95dd5ae59e9cf43db33584ac8c6f3e34a5ad516d. This change is owned by sibling task T4 — T4 dev report task 5 explicitly claims 'Add CLAUDE_CODE_SESSION_ID fallback in execute-push.py main() Step 2'. T1 dev report does not list execute-push.py. T4 QA is responsible for verifying this change.

spec_section_updates.section_4: Post-fix state (cycle dev-20260527-063758-T1): agents/changelog-analyst.md line 36 (DO NOT rule #7) now defines PUSH_GATE_SID via the three-part chain and uses it for the overwrite guard comparison. Phase 10 (lines 402-406) defines PUSH_GATE_SID = os.environ.get("CLAUDE_CODE_SESSION_ID") or os.environ.get("CLAUDE_SESSION_ID") or "unknown" (step 1), checks session_id against PUSH_GATE_SID in the overwrite guard (step 4), and writes session_id: PUSH_GATE_SID in the token JSON (step 5). PUSH_GATE_SID appears at lines 36, 402, 405, 406. Forbidden default-argument form absent (negative grep returned empty). Line 75 manifest SID unchanged.

qa.complaint_resolution_evidence: agents/changelog-analyst.md Phase 10 (line 394) now defines PUSH_GATE_SID using the exact three-part fallback chain and explicitly uses it for both the session_id token field and the overwrite-guard comparison. DO NOT rule #7 (line 36) now references PUSH_GATE_SID by name, eliminating the 'current session' ambiguity.

complaint_element_pointer.selector: agents/changelog-analyst.md:394 (Phase 10 push-gate write) and agents/changelog-analyst.md:36 (DO NOT rule #7)
complaint_element_pointer.how_located: grep -n PUSH_GATE_SID against agents/changelog-analyst.md; sed -n '75p' for line 75 check; git diff HEAD for scope verification

qa.overall_assessment: PASS. All three acceptance criteria are satisfied based on direct file verification. AC1: positive grep matched line 402 with the exact three-part or-chain; negative grep (forbidden default-argument form) returned empty. AC2: PUSH_GATE_SID appears at four locations (lines 36, 402, 405, 406) — all consistent references, no divergent env var lookup. AC3: git diff 95dd5ae shows only two hunks in agents/changelog-analyst.md (lines 33-37 and 397-414); line 75 identical to baseline; hooks/push.sh diff = 0 lines; scripts/execute-push.py change belongs to sibling task T4. Codex adversarial review: no blockers, verdict PASS.

success_criteria_results.evidence: grep -nP positive: MATCH line 402 (full text confirmed by direct Read). grep -nP negative: NO OUTPUT (forbidden form absent). grep -n PUSH_GATE_SID: 4 matches (lines 36, 402, 405, 406).

root_cause_verification.rationale: Root cause was Phase 10 underspecification of session_id source. Fix defines PUSH_GATE_SID once using CLAUDE_CODE_SESSION_ID (stable orchestrator-level ID, confirmed present in env) as primary with CLAUDE_SESSION_ID fallback and 'unknown' final fallback. Both the token write and the overwrite guard now use this single named value — eliminating divergence. The BA-confirmed failure mode (overwrite guard sees prior token session_id != new ephemeral CLAUDE_SESSION_ID and skips write) is directly addressed.

Net: keep T1 verdict as PASS with AC3 provenance wording tightened.
